intended_use: The Thirona LungQ software provides reproducible CT values for pulmonary tissue and specified endobronchial implants which is essential for providing quantitative support for diagnosis, treatment plan
intended_use_full: The Thirona LungQ software provides reproducible CT values for pulmonary tissue and specified endobronchial implants which is essential for providing quantitative support for diagnosis, treatment planning and follow up examination. The LungQ software can be used to support physician in the diagnosis and documentation of pulmonary tissues images (e.g., abnormalities) from CT thoracic datasets. Three-D segmentation and isolation of sub-compartments, volumetric analysis, density evaluations, estimated chronic perfusion defect analysis, fissure evaluation and reporting tools are provided.
target_condition: pulmonary abnormalities, emphysema (LAA-950HU and LAA-910HU analysis), chronic perfusion defects, endobronchial valve treatment candidacy and follow-up
ground_truth: For endobronchial implant analysis: clinical annotations by reference readers; For perfusion defect analysis: planar perfusion scintigraphy and SPECT-CT as reference standards
other_metrics: Valve detection precision ≥90%; Intra-class correlation (ICC) >0.75 for perfusion defect measurements; bias <5% and limits of agreement between -10% and 10% for perfusion scores compared to reference standards (planar perfusion scintigraphy and SPECT-CT)
